elements.description: Ø2"FD floor drain at the top of the room
Ø2"W vertical waste pipe on the right side of the plan
Ø2"V vent pipe in the middle of the plan
Ø4"S horizontal soil pipe from the WC fixture, routed toward the right wall/stack
Ø3/4"CW pipe on the right side, feeding the fixture cluster
second Ø3/4"CW pipe label on the left side of the plan
second Ø2"FD label lower in the plan, near the fixture cluster
Ø2"W label at the bottom of the plan, near the WC fixture icon
WC/toilet fixture icon and an additional circular fixture icon (likely a lavatory/wash basin) near the bottom of the plan; exact fixture symbols not individually confirmed at this resolution

warnings: ROOM LABEL AMBIGUITY: this view's own caption reads 'แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ 3' (bathroom 3), but the room-name text printed INSIDE the plan itself is not fully unambiguous at this resolution -- it reads as either 'ห้องน้ำ 2' or 'ห้องน้ำ 3' (the digit is small and could be misread as either). Both room labels use the same level (+3.65) on the upper-floor plan (page54), so the level alone does not resolve the ambiguity. Transcribed here using the sheet's own view caption ('ห้องน้ำ 3') as the authoritative label, per the assumption that the caption is correct and the in-plan digit is the harder-to-read one -- flagged for human zoom-review to confirm, since a mislabel would mean this detail and the sibling 'wc2_plan' view are swapped.
This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic underfloor-piping detail, explicitly noted '( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )'.

Exact fixture layout and precise pipe routing paths are only partially legible at this resolution -- positions and pipe-size callouts are best-effort, not measured coordinates; flagged for zoom-review.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true -- this is not on the building's structural plan grid.
